scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --outfile=behavior_pack/scripts/main.js --external:@minecraft/server --external:@minecraft/server-ui && esbuild src/client-main.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --outfile=behavior_pack/scripts/client.js --external:@minecraft/server --external:@minecraft/server-ui && node scripts/deploy.js
